# Paths to exclude from secret scanning
# (test fixtures, example configs, lock files)
.git/
node_modules/
.env.example
dashboard/nextjs/.env.example
package-lock.json
.*\.lock$
__pycache__/
.*\.pyc$
coverage.xml
test_results.txt
.github/workflows/ci.yml

# Test files with hardcoded dummy secrets/tokens (not real credentials)
tests/unit/test_telegram_alerts.py
tests/test_ws_auth_guard.py
tests/test_api_auth_guard.py
tests/test_pr004_auth_governance.py
tests/test_auth_session_compat.py
tests/test_auth_rate_limit.py
tests/test_signal_monitor_strategy.py
tests/test_redis_client_logging.py
tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts
tests/e2e/api-routes.spec.ts
tests/e2e/health.spec.ts
dashboard/nextjs/src/__tests__/auth.test.ts

# Ad-hoc test scripts with fake env values
_check_endpoint.py

# Environment templates (placeholders only)
railway_env_template.env
deploy/hostinger/README.md
